The bioactive constituents of Camellia sasanqua include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Camellia sasanqua include tea infusions, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
